kill_fact: No kill. Every load-bearing fact survives primary-source verification: LUCIDITY is fully enrolled (n=78, last patient randomized/dosed 2026-03-24 per company release), topline 'on track, anticipated Q3 2026' is reaffirmed in the Q1 2026 results, and the readout is a mechanical 16-week-primary data-lock with no financing/counterparty/regulatory-discretion contingency. The floor is real: $279.8M cash/marketable securities at 2026-03-31, runway guided INTO 2028, no going-concern, no forced pre-event ATM. The one disqualifier the bull under-weights is that the asymmetry is NOT a washout — the stock has already re-rated ~3x off the $4.80 low to ~$15.67, so price upside (+79% to $28) and downside (-74% to ~$4) are roughly symmetric in magnitude; only the ~62-75% PoS tilts EV positive. This is a genuine defined-risk binary, not a discounted entry, and it carries the verified Relyvrio/PHOENIX confirmatory-failure scar plus near-certain post-success dilution — so it earns aggressive-on-the-event sizing but NOT pristine conviction.
corrections: (1) Bull's downside floor of $4.00 leans on a pipeline-option stub; HARD cash-per-share is only ~$2.53 ($279.8M / ~110.6M sh) — in a sentiment-crushing miss the clear can undershoot $4 toward the $4.80 prior trough or lower, so treat $4 as soft, $2.53 as the hard backstop. (2) Peak-sales anchor: bull cites HCW ~$815M (2033); current street is materially higher — BofA models ~$1.8B and Stifel >$1.5B peak — which strengthens, not weakens, the win-target. (3) Target precision: BofA = $22 (raised from $19), Stifel = $21 (Buy), HCW = $34, Mizuho = $21; the $28 board win target sits mid-range, well-corroborated. (4) Post-success dilutive raise to fund the 2027 launch is a confirmed known overhang that caps immediate upside capture.
evidence: Amylyx press release, 2026-03-24: 'Announces Completion of Enrollment in Pivotal Phase 3 LUCIDITY Clinical Trial of Avexitide' — last participant randomized and dosed, 78 participants, 16-week DB period, FDA-agreed composite Level 2+3 hypoglycemia primary endpoint, 'Topline data readout on track; anticipated in Q3 2026' (amylyx.com/news).

Amylyx Q1 2026 Financial Results, 2026-05-07 (8-K ex-99.1, SEC EDGAR CIK 0001658551 acc. 000119312526210286): $279.8M cash and marketable securities at 2026-03-31 (vs $317M at YE2025), runway guided INTO 2028 covering LUCIDITY Q3 2026 readout + potential 2027 approval/launch; no going-concern.

Analyst targets (Investing.com, Apr-May 2026): Mizuho $21 (Outperform), BofA $22 (peak sales ~$1.8B), Stifel $21 Buy (peak >$1.5B), H.C. Wainwright $34 — street range $21-$34 brackets the ~$28 win target.

Sponsor scar (verified): AMX0035/Relyvrio failed its confirmatory PHOENIX Phase 3 in ALS (2024) and was withdrawn — real replication risk, though avexitide is a different drug/mechanism/indication with a 5-trial replicated PBH signal at the same 90mg dose/endpoint.

Independent re-verification 2026-06-29: catalyst UNFIRED (Q3 2026 not yet begun); Guggenheim subsequently raised target to $40 ('Best Idea') and AMLX hit a 52-week high $18.65 — pre-event re-rate continues, spread to ~$30 win value narrowed but intact; cash floor/runway-into-2028 reconfirmed (investors.amylyx.com Q1 2026 release; investing.com Guggenheim/52wk-high).
